abilities.name: Burrowing Charge
abilities.description: When Charge, may make single 2 AP Close Combat attack instead of two 1 AP.

abilities.name: Rock Drill
abilities.description: May move through solid stone without speed reduction. May leave tunnel behind.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.description: Ignores terrain penalties when taking Movement Actions.

actions: (2) Pneumatic Drill (Pneumatic) | AV: 6 (11) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 4/5/7 damage, ignoring Armor. Mask Excavation: Creates 2 yard deep hole. TN 10 Evade or fall Prone.
system.notes: Worm-like mining constructs by Viktor Ramos. Sense and burrow toward Soulstone deposits. Tunnel underground, burst beneath enemies, drill through anything.
